landing.hero_headline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai
landing.hero_sub: AmyNest AI minutes mein aapke bachhe ke liye personalized, research-backed parenting plan banati hai — child psychology pe based, random tips pe nahi.
landing.hero_free: ✨ Shuru karna free · Koi credit card zaruri nahi
landing.problems_heading: Abhi bhi akele sab figure out kar rahe hain?
landing.problems_sub: Har parent inka saamna karte hain. Amy Coach aapko personalized, research-backed step-by-step plan deti hai — generic tips nahi.
landing.not_alone: Aap akele nahi hain — AmyNest ke 87% parents 2 hafte mein calmer mornings report karte hain.
landing.features_heading: Asli Child Science pe Bane Tools
landing.features_sub: Ek platform — har feature AAP guidelines, developmental psychology aur behavioral science pe grounded.
landing.coach_title: Amy Coach — Asli Parenting Challenges Solve Karein
landing.coach_desc: Nakhron se screen time tak, neend se dhyaan tak — Amy Coach aapko Dr. Ross Greene ke CPS model, Dr. Carol Dweck ke growth mindset framework aur AAP guidelines pe based 12-step plans deti hai. Koi generic advice nahi — sirf woh jo aapke bachhe ke liye kaam karta hai.
landing.highlight_1: Aapke bachhe ki profile pe based personalized plans
landing.highlight_4: Solve hone tak Amy ka continuous guidance
landing.feature_routine_desc: Structured routines jo habit loop theory pe based hain — aapke bachhe ke brain ko lasting habits ke liye ready karti hain.
landing.feature_hub_desc: Expert articles, daily tips aur Amy AI guidance — top child development research se curated.
landing.feature_ai_desc: Kuch bhi poochein, research-grounded jawab turant paayein. Jaise aapki pocket mein ek child psychologist ho.
landing.mid_cta: Amy Coach free try karein — 3 minutes se kam mein aapka pehla personalized plan.
landing.how_eyebrow: Minutes mein Apna Pehla Plan Paayein
landing.how_sub: Teen steps mein aapke bachhe ke liye science-backed plan.
landing.step1_desc: Woh parenting problem chunein jise aap solve karna chahte hain — nakhre, neend, screen time, dhyaan, aur bahut kuch.
landing.step2_title: Amy ko apne bachhe ke baare mein batayein
landing.step2_desc: Umar, personality aur habits — Amy iska use aapke bachhe ki specific profile ke liye plan calibrate karne mein karti hai.
landing.step3_desc: 12-step, science-backed plan paayein jise aap aaj shuru kar sakte hain — proven behavioral frameworks pe banaya gaya.
landing.trust_sub: AmyNest 30+ peer-reviewed frameworks pe bana hai — opinions pe nahi. Real science, real results.
landing.trust1_desc: Har routine Cue → Routine → Reward ke around design ki gayi hai. Bachhe lasting habits banate hain — sirf temporary behavior changes nahi.
landing.trust2_desc: Amy outcome se zyada effort ko reward karti hai — Stanford research se proven ki yeh bachhon mein long-term success build karta hai.
landing.trust3_desc: Screen time, sleep schedules aur developmental milestones — sab American Academy of Pediatrics aur CDC guidelines ke according calibrated.
landing.final_cta_heading: Aapke bachhe ko ek plan ki zarurat hai jo waqai kaam kare.
landing.final_cta_sub: 12,000+ families se judein jo research-backed parenting plans se calm, smart, zyada confident bachhe pal rahe hain — bilkul free.
landing.footer_tagline: Jahaan Smart Parenting Shuru Hoti Hai

command_center.calming_title: Shaant karne wale tareeke — yeh isi order mein try karein
calming_steps: Unke saath 60 seconds tak dheere-dheere 4-4-6 saans lein.
Unhe kasskar gale lagayein + soft voice mein baat karein (koi sawal nahi).
Kisi low-stim activity par switch karein: paani ki bottle, soft toy, dim light.
command_center.winddown_title: Aaj raat ke liye wind-down plan
winddown_steps: Bedtime se 30 min pehle lights kam karein; uske baad koi screen nahi.
Gunguna paani se nahaana ya face wash + har raat wahi lullaby.
Roz ek hi time lights out — ek halki si alarm cue set karein.
